Legend

  • ✅ Ready - Full 26.2 support confirmed
  • ⚙️ In Progress - Update/beta available or likely compatible pending official release
  • ⏳ Waiting - Awaiting developer update
  • ⚠️ Note - Status may occasionally be behind.
